intended_use: QIR Suite is intended to be used for viewing, post-processing, and quantitative evaluation of cardiovascular Magnetic Resonance (MR) images in a DICOM (Digital Imaging and Communication in Medicine) S
intended_use_full: QIR Suite is intended to be used for viewing, post-processing, and quantitative evaluation of cardiovascular Magnetic Resonance (MR) images in a DICOM (Digital Imaging and Communication in Medicine) Standard format. The software has been validated for use on adult patients.
target_condition: Cardiovascular conditions requiring quantitative analysis of cardiac magnetic resonance images
ground_truth: Predicate devices (Segment CMR for features 1-6, Circle CVI42 for features 7-8) and ground truth for deep learning algorithm validation
other_metrics: Correlation coefficient (R²): minimum 0.9792, average 0.9954 across cardiac function parameters; absolute mean difference: 0.8% for distance measurements, 2.8% for area measurements, under 5% for cardiac function parameters, under 10% for 2D flow parameters. DICE coefficient for deep learning algorithms: 0.893 (AG), 0.888 (AG+), 0.908 (Fast).
